Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Aug-14-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Company, Inc.'s motion to stay is off calendar pursuant to the conditional non-opposition and proposed order that the Court already signed. Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Company's proceedings in this matter are stayed until October 9, 2012, date set for hearing of defendant's motion to disqualify plaintiff's counsel. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported = (503/TLJ)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Aug-09-2012 Continued To Aug-14-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant Kaiser Gypsum Co., Inc.'s motion to stay is continued on the court's own motion to August 14. The motion will be granted pursuant to representations by counsel. On August 14 the motion will be taken off calendar if all orders have been signed and filed. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
